Since 2000, SalaryExpert has been utilizing ERl's \(3 0 +\) years of experience to provide the public and employers with research on compensation by pulling salary survey data and integrating that data into our custom salary products. Want to see how we can help your business with salary benchmarking and compensation analysis?

For Employers

Want to see how we can help you evaluate your career and plan for your future?

For Job Seekers

## Why SalaryExpert?

Since 2000, SalaryExpert has been utilizing ERl's \(3 0 +\) years of experience to provide the public and employers with research on compensation by pulling salary survey data and integrating that data into our custom salary products. Our only business is data, and the accuracy of our compensation data is our number one priority. Thousands of companies rely on SalaryExpert's data for their compensation planning needs. We have no conflict of interest from consulting or contracting, which allows us to stay independent and objective. We employ Ph.D. level data scientists and seasoned compensation professionals who provide an unrivaled level of expertise.

text_blocks.text_content: Advanced analytics, such as machine learning, longitudinal analysis, and meta- analysis, are all part of our methodology, which enables us to understand how each job fits into its organization, location, and industry, and how market forces influence compensation. Compensation data sourced from internal surveys, third- party surveys, and public sources provide a robust sample that is second to none in terms of volume and quality. Convergent validation has shown \(99\%\) agreement between Salary Assessor results and time- matched survey responses.
Data are gathered from 3 sources: surveys we conduct, surveys purchased from other organizations, and reports from publicly traded organizations.
After compiling our compensation data, we conduct QA to ensure our data is vetted, verified, and of the highest quality.
SalaryExpert conducts advanced analytics to accurately capture the market value of each occupation in our salary survey database.
SalaryExpert analysts double- check the results for each job every quarter. Our verified salary survey information helps set benchmark pay.
Explore SalaryExpert's wage, salary, and compensation databases of over 11,000 job titles, 1,100 industries, and 8,500 locations.
Schedule time with our certified representatives to learn more about our tools for salary and cost of living analyses.
Try Our ProductsUtilize our compensation planning tools to help you find everything from reliable and verified salary survey data to executive compensation benchmarking data.

Advanced analytics, such as machine learning, longitudinal analysis, and meta- analysis, are all part of our methodology, which enables us to understand how each job fits into its organization, location, and industry, and how market forces influence compensation. Compensation data sourced from internal surveys, third- party surveys, and public sources provide a robust sample that is second to none in terms of volume and quality. Convergent validation has shown \(99\%\) agreement between Salary Assessor results and time- matched survey responses.  

## Our Process  

## Our Process  

## Data Collection  

Data are gathered from 3 sources: surveys we conduct, surveys purchased from other organizations, and reports from publicly traded organizations.  

## Data Verification  

After compiling our compensation data, we conduct QA to ensure our data is vetted, verified, and of the highest quality.  

## Analysis  

SalaryExpert conducts advanced analytics to accurately capture the market value of each occupation in our salary survey database.  

## Quality Assurance  

SalaryExpert analysts double- check the results for each job every quarter. Our verified salary survey information helps set benchmark pay.  

## SalaryExpert Results  

Explore SalaryExpert's wage, salary, and compensation databases of over 11,000 job titles, 1,100 industries, and 8,500 locations.  

## Schedule Time with a Rep  

Schedule time with our certified representatives to learn more about our tools for salary and cost of living analyses.
